title: Swift (corvette)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Swift''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that served within the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Alliance Fleet]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''

[[Category:Starships of the Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
